mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_out(elderly_id, bed_id, check_out_time, apply_user_id, reason, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{elderlyId}, #{bedId}, #{checkOutTime}, #{applyUserId}, #{reason}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE check_out
elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, bed_id = #{bedId}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, reason = #{reason},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE check_out SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE check_out SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM check_out WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT co.*, e.name as elderlyName, b.bed_name as bedName, r.room_name as roomName, bd.building_name as buildingName, u.real_name as applyUserName FROM check_out co LEFT JOIN elderly e ON co.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN bed b ON co.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building bd ON r.building_id = bd.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON co.apply_user_id = u.id WHERE co.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY co.create_time DESC
